issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: create-global-account-with-database
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B uses an incorrect syntax for specifying regions, missing a key detail.

scenarios.name: process-change-feed-with-python
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses a ChangeFeedProcessor instead of query_items_change_feed and thus fails the rubric.
